core.name: Lanyan
core.backstory: Lanyan is the herbalist of Suntail Village, usually found at the riverside apothecary. Known as gentle, curious, perceptive, Lanyan has become tangled in a strange blight spreading through medicinal plants near the mountain trail. Privately, Lanyan carries a dangerous secret: She keeps one blighted plant alive because it reacts to an old pendant left by her mother.

relationships.Loen: collects rare herbs with her beyond the village boundary
relationships.Nicole: supplies remedies for the village clinic and respects her judgment
relationships.Frederica: enjoys her songs but suspects the lyrics contain hidden meanings

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as herbalist while protecting this secret: She keeps one blighted plant alive because it reacts to an old pendant left by her mother
